title: Briny Flaky Portuguese Fish Bisque
description: A quick-fix Portuguese dish made with flaky fish, aromatic vegetables, and a touch of dark rum. This gluten-free-friendly recipe features a yuzu-cure for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the fish stock, white wine, and dark rum to the saucepan. Bring to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the cod fillets to the saucepan and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the cod from the saucepan and flake into pieces.
Stir in the yuzu juice and black pepper. Season with salt to taste.
Return the cod to the saucepan and simmer for 1-2 minutes, until heated through.
Serve the bisque hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Strain the bisque through a fine-mesh sieve into bowls. Serve immediately.
